LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF 290 SUTTER, LLP'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. MOVING PAPERS WERE PROVIDED PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. ANSWER WAS FILED BY SOMEONE UNAUTHORIZED TO PRACTICE LAW IN CALIFORNIA AND CANNOT REPRESENT A CORPORATION. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE WAS LIKEWISE GRANTED. THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, REPORTER: LA VENA WARD, CSR # 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATHERINE JONES OF THE MILLER STARR REGALIA LAW FIRM,
TEL. NO. (925) 935-9400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - MOVING PAPERS WERE PROVIDED PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF 290 SUTTER, LLP'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ANSWER WAS FILED BY SOMEONE UNAUTHORIZED TO PRACTICE LAW IN CALIFORNIA AND CANNOT REPRESENT A CORPORATION. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE WAS LIKEWISE GRANTED. THE COURT DENIED THE REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: La Vena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/MJM)
